name: Golden Fudge I
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 cups Butterscotch wafers or Chopped butterscotch blocks
1 cup Chopped pecans or other nut
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, butter, and coffee cream in a heavy 2 1/2-quart saucepan.
2. Place on medium heat and stir until butter is melted.
3. Cook without stirring to 238 degrees F., about 15 minutes.
4. Remove from heat; add butterscotch and marshmallow.
5. Stir until thoroughly blended.
6. Add nuts, raisins, and flavorings.
7. Pour into 2 greased 8-inch square pans.
8. Let set several hours until firm.
9. Cut into squares.
10. Keep in closed container.
Makes about 98 pieces. NOTE: Invert sugar is Cane sugar in liquid form. Improves the quality and keeping properties in candy. If it crystallizes, place over hot water until it liquifies.
